title: Free tax clinics - Canada.ca
content:
Through the Community Volunteer Income Tax Program (CVITP) and the Income Tax Assistance – Volunteer Program (ITAVP) in Quebec, community organizations host free tax clinics where volunteers complete tax returns for people with a modest income and a simple tax situation.

### Get your taxes done at a free tax clinic
Find out if you are eligible and learn about the types of clinics available

### Find a free tax clinic
Choose a clinic based on your location and the type of clinic you prefer

### Free tax clinics statistics
View the number of participating organizations, volunteers, and people helped through free tax clinics

## For organizations and volunteers

### Become a CVITP organization
Learn about how the program works, your organization’s responsibilities, and how to register

### Become a CVITP volunteer
Understand the roles and responsibilities of volunteers and how to register

### CVITP Grant for hosting free tax clinics
Find out if your organization is eligible for funding, and how to apply
Find out how easy it is to get help at a free tax clinic
